question_de: Wer ist der eingetragene Eigentümer des Grundstücks laut Grundbuch Abteilung I?
question_en: Who is the registered owner of the property according to Land Register Section I?
llm_instruction: Extract the full legal name of the registered owner from Section I (Abteilung I) of the Grundbuch extract. If multiple owners, list all with their respective shares.

question_de: Welche Lasten und Beschränkungen sind in Abteilung II des Grundbuchs eingetragen?
question_en: What encumbrances and restrictions are recorded in Section II of the Land Register?
llm_instruction: List all encumbrances from Abteilung II including easements, pre-emption rights, priority notices, and restrictions on disposal.

question_de: Welche Grundpfandrechte (Hypotheken, Grundschulden) sind in Abteilung III eingetragen?
question_en: What mortgages and land charges are recorded in Section III?
llm_instruction: Extract all mortgages and land charges from Section III, including amounts, creditors, interest rates.

question_de: Wie lauten die Flurstücknummern, Gemarkung und Grundstücksgröße laut Bestandsverzeichnis?
question_en: What are the parcel numbers, cadastral district, and plot size per the inventory register?
llm_instruction: Extract all parcel numbers, cadastral district, and total plot size in sqm.

question_de: Bestehen Vorkaufsrechte zugunsten Dritter oder der Gemeinde?
question_en: Are there any pre-emption rights in favour of third parties or the municipality?
llm_instruction: Identify any pre-emption rights either contractual or statutory. Note whether a Negativzeugnis has been obtained.

question_de: Sind Wegerechte, Leitungsrechte oder sonstige Grunddienstbarkeiten eingetragen?
question_en: Are there any rights of way, utility easements, or other easements registered?
llm_instruction: List all easements including rights of way, utility rights, and building restrictions. Note the beneficiary.

question_en: Are there heritable building rights (Erbbaurecht)?
llm_instruction: Determine whether subject to Erbbaurecht. Extract term, Erbbauzins, adjustment clauses, Heimfallklausel.

question_de: Wie ist die gesellschaftsrechtliche Eigentümerstruktur (SPV, Konzernstruktur)?
question_en: What is the corporate ownership structure (SPV, group structure)?
llm_instruction: Map the full ownership chain from SPV to UBO.

question_en: Is a current commercial register extract available?
llm_instruction: Verify existence and currency. Extract entity name, HRB number, directors.

question_en: Who is the ultimate beneficial owner (UBO)?
llm_instruction: Identify UBO(s) holding >25% directly or indirectly.

question_de: Liegt der bestehende Kaufvertrag vor und welche Konditionen enthält er?
question_en: Is the purchase agreement available and what are the key terms?
llm_instruction: Summarize key terms: price, structure, closing conditions, R&W.

question_de: Bestehen noch gültige Gewährleistungen/Garantien aus dem Erwerb?
question_en: Are there surviving warranties from the acquisition?
llm_instruction: Extract surviving R&W. Note expiry dates and caps.

question_en: Are there priority notices (Auflassungsvormerkung)?
llm_instruction: Check Section II for Auflassungsvormerkungen.

question_en: Are there Baulasten registered?
llm_instruction: List all Baulasten with type, date, and impact.

question_en: Are there monument protection or other usage restrictions?
llm_instruction: Identify monument protection or other public-law restrictions.

question_de: Stimmt die Grundstücksfläche laut Grundbuch mit der tatsächlichen überein?
question_en: Does plot size per Land Register match actual area?
llm_instruction: Compare stated vs. measured area. Flag >2% discrepancy.

question_de: Liegt ein aktueller amtlicher Lageplan vor?
question_en: Is a current official site plan available?
llm_instruction: Verify availability and currency of Lageplan.

question_en: Is a declaration of division (Teilungserklärung) available?
llm_instruction: Analyze allocation of Sondereigentum vs. Gemeinschaftseigentum.

question_en: Is there a Gemeinschaftsordnung?
llm_instruction: Summarize key provisions: voting, cost allocation, use restrictions.

question_en: Are there neighbour law agreements or disputes?
llm_instruction: Identify neighbour agreements/disputes. Flag encroachments.

question_en: Are there restitution claims?
llm_instruction: Check restitution claims, esp. eastern Germany.

question_de: Liegen alle Vollmachten für die Transaktion vor?
question_en: Are all powers of attorney in place?
llm_instruction: Verify corporate approvals and PoAs.

question_en: Are there expropriation or land readjustment proceedings?
llm_instruction: Check for expropriation/Umlegung proceedings.

question_en: Is the property fully connected to utilities?
llm_instruction: Verify all utility connections and paid charges.

question_en: Have all development charges been paid?
llm_instruction: Verify payment. Flag outstanding amounts.

question_en: Are there usufruct or residential rights?
llm_instruction: Identify usufruct/residential rights in Section II.

question_en: Are there Reallasten registered?
llm_instruction: Check for Reallasten in Section II.

question_de: Liegt eine KYC/AML-Prüfung des Verkäufers vor?
question_en: Has a KYC/AML check been done?
llm_instruction: Verify KYC/AML: identity, PEP screening, sanctions screening.

question_en: Are there repurchase or purchase rights of third parties?
llm_instruction: Identify repurchase rights, options.

question_de: Wird das Grundstück über Nachbargrundstücke erschlossen?
question_en: Is access via third-party rights of way?
llm_instruction: Determine if access relies on third-party land.

question_en: Are there unregistered historical rights?
llm_instruction: Investigate unregistered historical rights.

question_de: Sind Sanktionen gegen den Verkäufer bekannt?
question_en: Are there sanctions against the seller?
llm_instruction: Check EU, US (OFAC), UN sanctions lists.

question_en: Are there disposal restrictions (insolvency notes)?
llm_instruction: Check Section II for disposal restrictions.

question_de: Liegt ein LOI oder eine Exklusivitätsvereinbarung vor?
question_en: Is there a LOI or exclusivity agreement?
llm_instruction: Extract key terms: exclusivity period, break fees.

question_en: Are there leases for partial land areas?
llm_instruction: Identify partial-area leases. Note income and terms.

question_de: Liegt das Grundstück im Geltungsbereich eines Bebauungsplans?
question_en: Is the property within a binding B-Plan?
llm_instruction: Determine whether covered by a B-Plan. Identify plan number and designations.

question_de: Welche Art der baulichen Nutzung ist festgesetzt?
question_en: What building use type is designated?
llm_instruction: Extract designated use per BauNVO. Check compatibility with current use.

question_de: Welches Maß der baulichen Nutzung ist festgesetzt (GRZ, GFZ, Höhe)?
question_en: What building density is designated?
llm_instruction: Extract GRZ, GFZ, max height. Compare with actual building.

question_en: Are all required building permits available?
llm_instruction: Verify permits for all structures. Note dates, scope, conditions.

question_de: Stimmt die genehmigte mit der tatsächlichen Nutzung überein?
question_en: Does approved use match actual use?
llm_instruction: Compare permitted vs. actual use. Flag unauthorized changes.

question_de: Gibt es nicht umgesetzte Baugenehmigungen oder Vorbescheide?
question_en: Are there unexecuted permits or Vorbescheide?
llm_instruction: Identify outstanding permits. Check expiry.

question_de: Sind Auflagen aus Baugenehmigungen noch offen?
question_en: Are there unfulfilled permit conditions?
llm_instruction: Identify unfulfilled conditions.

question_en: Are there exemptions from the B-Plan?
llm_instruction: Identify exemptions per BauGB §31.

question_de: Liegt das Grundstück im unbeplanten Innenbereich (§34 BauGB)?
question_en: Is the property in an area without B-Plan?
llm_instruction: Assess §34 applicability and surrounding context.

question_en: Are there ongoing B-Plan amendments?
llm_instruction: Check for ongoing B-Plan amendments.

question_en: Are required parking spaces verified?
llm_instruction: Verify required vs. existing parking.

question_en: Is there an approved fire protection concept?
llm_instruction: Verify existence and currency. Check Prüfingenieur approval.

question_en: Are escape/rescue route requirements met?
llm_instruction: Verify first and second rescue routes and fire brigade access.

question_en: Have all use changes been permitted?
llm_instruction: Check permit history for all use changes.

question_de: Besteht Bestandsschutz für die aktuelle Nutzung?
question_en: Does the current use have Bestandsschutz?
llm_instruction: Assess Bestandsschutz. Note loss risk.

question_en: Is a complete building file available?
llm_instruction: Verify completeness. Note gaps.

question_en: Are there moratoriums or building prohibitions?
llm_instruction: Check for Veränderungssperren.

question_en: Are other public law permits required?
llm_instruction: Identify additional public law permits.

question_en: What does the FNP designate?
llm_instruction: Extract FNP designation.

question_en: Are setback requirements met?
llm_instruction: Verify Abstandsflächen compliance.

question_de: Gibt es Schwarzbauten oder nicht genehmigte Anbauten?
question_en: Are there unauthorized constructions?
llm_instruction: Compare approved plans with actual building.

question_en: When was the last fire prevention inspection?
llm_instruction: Extract date, findings, open deficiencies.

question_en: Are there urban planning contracts?
llm_instruction: Check for BauGB §11/§12 agreements.

question_en: Is a structural review available?
llm_instruction: Verify structural calculations.

question_en: Is secured utility access proven?
llm_instruction: Confirm gesicherte Erschließung per BauGB.

question_de: Wie viele Mietverträge bestehen und wie ist die Mieterstruktur?
question_en: How many leases exist and what is the tenant structure?
llm_instruction: List all tenants, areas, lease types, and annual rent per tenant.

question_de: Wie hoch ist die Jahres-Ist-Miete und Soll-Miete?
question_en: What is the annual actual and contractual rent?
llm_instruction: Extract total Ist-Miete and Soll-Miete. Reconcile differences.

question_en: What are the lease terms and notice periods?
llm_instruction: Create lease expiry schedule with start, end, notice period, break options.

question_en: Are there tenant renewal options?
llm_instruction: List all renewal options with exercise conditions and rent adjustment.

question_en: What rent adjustment mechanisms are agreed?
llm_instruction: Extract escalation clauses: type, frequency, thresholds.

question_en: What is the service charge arrangement?
llm_instruction: Analyze service charge structure: Pauschale vs. Vorauszahlung, recoverable items.

question_en: What is the service charge recovery rate?
llm_instruction: Calculate recovery rate. Flag landlord shortfall.

question_en: Are there rent reductions, arrears, or defaults?
llm_instruction: Identify rent reductions, arrears, delays. Quantify exposure.

question_en: What rental securities are in place?
llm_instruction: List all securities: type, amount, status per tenant.

question_en: What reinstatement obligations exist?
llm_instruction: Extract reinstatement and make-good obligations at lease end.

question_en: What is the vacancy rate?
llm_instruction: Calculate physical and economic vacancy. List vacant units.

question_en: Are there sublease arrangements?
llm_instruction: Identify subleases. Check landlord consent.

question_en: Do tenants have pre-emption rights?
llm_instruction: Check leases for tenant pre-emption or pre-lease rights.

question_en: Are there change-of-control clauses?
llm_instruction: Identify CoC clauses: consent requirements, special termination rights.

question_en: Are there non-compete clauses?
llm_instruction: Identify competition protection clauses.

question_en: How are maintenance obligations allocated?
llm_instruction: Analyze allocation: landlord vs. tenant, Dach und Fach.

question_en: Are there rent-free periods or tenant incentives?
llm_instruction: List incentives. Calculate net effective rent.

question_de: Ist die Schriftform (§550 BGB) für alle Mietverträge gewahrt?
question_en: Is written form (§550 BGB) satisfied for all leases?
llm_instruction: Check all commercial leases for §550 compliance.

question_en: Are there modernization agreements?
llm_instruction: Identify modernization provisions and rent adjustment rights.

question_en: Are there special termination rights?
llm_instruction: List all special termination rights for landlord and tenant.

question_en: What floor area measurement standard is used?
llm_instruction: Identify measurement standard. Check consistency.

question_en: What is the WALT/WAULT?
llm_instruction: Calculate WALT to first break and to expiry.

question_de: Wie verhält sich die Vertragsmiete zur Marktmiete?
question_en: How do contractual rents compare to market rents?
llm_instruction: Compare contractual vs. market rents. Calculate reversionary potential.

question_de: Wie ist die Bonität der Top-Mieter?
question_en: What is the creditworthiness of top tenants?
llm_instruction: List top 10 tenants by rent share with credit ratings. Flag concentration risk.

question_en: Are there lease amendments or side letters?
llm_instruction: List all amendments per lease. Check §550 compliance.

question_en: Are there tenant fixtures requiring removal?
llm_instruction: Identify tenant fixtures and reinstatement obligations.

question_en: Are there active lease negotiations?
llm_instruction: Status of ongoing negotiations. Note headline terms.

question_en: Which tenants have recently terminated?
llm_instruction: List pending terminations. Note date, area, and rent impact.

question_en: Are there operating obligations?
llm_instruction: Check for Betriebspflicht clauses.

question_de: Wie ist die Umsatzsteueroptierung (§9 UStG) geregelt?
question_en: How is the VAT option structured?
llm_instruction: Check landlord VAT option per §9 UStG. Verify tenant eligibility.

question_en: Are there rent control restrictions?
llm_instruction: Determine Mietpreisbremse applicability. Verify compliance.

question_en: Is a qualified Mietspiegel available?
llm_instruction: Compare rents against Mietspiegel for rent increase potential.

question_de: Wie ist die Kostenverteilung für Dach und Fach?
question_en: How are structural maintenance costs allocated?
llm_instruction: Analyze Dach und Fach cost allocation.

question_de: Stimmen vertragliche mit tatsächlichen Mietflächen überein?
question_en: Do contractual areas match actual areas?
llm_instruction: Compare contractual vs. measured areas. Flag >2% discrepancy.

question_en: Are there seller rent guarantees?
llm_instruction: Check for seller rent guarantees. Note term and conditions.

question_de: Wie ist der Vermietungsstand im Marktvergleich?
question_en: How does letting status compare to market?
llm_instruction: Analyze letting status vs. local market benchmarks.

question_en: What insurance clauses are in leases?
llm_instruction: Extract insurance requirements and pass-through provisions.

question_en: Are leases GDPR-compliant?
llm_instruction: Check for GDPR compliance in tenant data handling.

question_en: What advertising/signage rights exist?
llm_instruction: Extract signage rights and revenue arrangements.

question_en: Are there COVID-19-related rent adjustments?
llm_instruction: Check for pandemic-related concessions still in effect.

question_de: Wie hoch ist der vereinbarte Kaufpreis und auf welcher Basis wurde er ermittelt?
question_en: What is the agreed purchase price and how was it determined?
llm_instruction: Extract purchase price. Identify basis: DCF, income capitalization, comparable transactions.

question_de: Wie hoch ist der Brutto- und Netto-Anfangsertrag (Initial Yield)?
question_en: What is the gross and net initial yield?
llm_instruction: Calculate gross and net initial yield based on current passing rent and purchase price.

question_de: Liegt ein aktuelles Verkehrswertgutachten (nach ImmoWertV) vor?
question_en: Is a current market value appraisal (per ImmoWertV) available?
llm_instruction: Verify existence and currency of valuation. Note approach, key assumptions, and resulting value.

question_de: Wie ist der Ertragswert und welche Annahmen liegen zugrunde?
question_en: What is the income value and underlying assumptions?
llm_instruction: Extract Ertragswert calculation: Rohertrag, Bewirtschaftungskosten, Liegenschaftszinssatz, Restnutzungsdauer.

question_de: Liegt eine DCF-Analyse vor und welche Annahmen wurden getroffen?
question_en: Is a DCF analysis available and what assumptions were used?
llm_instruction: Extract DCF assumptions: discount rate, exit yield, rental growth, void periods, capex allowance.

question_de: Wie hoch sind die jährlichen nicht-umlagefähigen Betriebskosten?
question_en: What are the annual non-recoverable operating costs?
llm_instruction: Quantify all non-recoverable operating costs: management fees, insurance, maintenance not passed through.

question_de: Wie haben sich die Mieteinnahmen in den letzten 3-5 Jahren entwickelt?
question_en: How have rental revenues developed over the last 3-5 years?
llm_instruction: Provide annual rental income for the past 3-5 years. Identify trends and drivers of change.

question_de: Wie hoch ist das Net Operating Income (NOI)?
question_en: What is the Net Operating Income (NOI)?
llm_instruction: Calculate NOI: gross rental income minus non-recoverable costs.

question_en: What is the real estate transfer tax (RETT)?
llm_instruction: Calculate applicable RETT rate per Bundesland. Note if share deal reduces/avoids RETT.

question_de: Wie hoch sind die gesamten Transaktionskosten (Nebenkosten)?
question_en: What are the total transaction costs?
llm_instruction: Calculate total acquisition costs: RETT, notary, land register, broker, legal/tax advisory.

question_en: What is the land value benchmark (Bodenrichtwert)?
llm_instruction: Extract the current Bodenrichtwert per sqm. Compare with the implied land value from the purchase price.

question_en: What is the existing financing structure?
llm_instruction: Extract loan details: lender, outstanding balance, interest rate, maturity, LTV, covenants.

question_de: Bestehen Covenants oder Change-of-Control-Klauseln in Darlehensverträgen?
question_en: Are there covenants or CoC clauses in loan agreements?
llm_instruction: Identify financial covenants (LTV, DSCR, ICR) and CoC clauses. Check current compliance.

question_en: What is the 10-year cash flow projection?
llm_instruction: Review 10-year cash flow projection. Check key assumptions: rent growth, vacancy, capex, opex.

question_de: Wie hat sich der Marktwert in den letzten Jahren entwickelt?
question_en: How has the market value developed in recent years?
llm_instruction: Track market value development over time. Compare with market benchmarks.

question_en: What is the purchase price multiplier?
llm_instruction: Calculate purchase price multiplier (price / annual rent). Compare with market.

question_de: Wie hoch ist der Sachwert des Gebäudes?
question_en: What is the asset value (Sachwert) of the building?
llm_instruction: Extract Sachwert calculation including NHK, Alterswertminderung, and Marktanpassung.

question_de: Wie ist die Mietrendite im Vergleich zu Benchmarks?
question_en: How does the rental yield compare to benchmarks?
llm_instruction: Compare property yield with market benchmarks and prime yields.

question_en: Is a current budget/business plan available?
llm_instruction: Verify availability of current budget. Compare with actuals.

question_de: Sind die Jahresabschlüsse der Objektgesellschaft geprüft?
question_en: Are the financial statements of the SPV audited?
llm_instruction: Verify audited accounts for last 3 years. Note qualifications or issues.

question_de: Gibt es mietfreie Zeiten oder Einmaleffekte, die den Cashflow verzerren?
question_en: Are there rent-free periods or one-off effects distorting cash flow?
llm_instruction: Identify and quantify rent-free periods, one-off payments, or unusual items.

question_de: Wie hoch ist die wirtschaftliche Restnutzungsdauer?
question_en: What is the remaining economic useful life?
llm_instruction: Estimate remaining economic useful life considering condition, quality, and obsolescence risk.

question_de: Welche steuerlichen Implikationen hat die Transaktionsstruktur (Share vs. Asset Deal)?
question_en: What are the tax implications of the transaction structure?
llm_instruction: Analyze tax implications of share vs. asset deal: RETT, VAT, income tax, loss carry-forwards.

question_en: Are there value-reducing factors (contamination, maintenance backlog)?
llm_instruction: Identify and quantify value-reducing factors for purchase price negotiation.

question_de: Welche vergleichbaren Transaktionen wurden am Markt beobachtet?
question_en: What comparable transactions have been observed in the market?
llm_instruction: List comparable transactions with price/sqm, yield, and date.

question_de: Wie hoch ist die Grundsteuer und wie wird sie berechnet?
question_en: What is the property tax and how is it calculated?
llm_instruction: Extract Grundsteuer amount, Messbetrag, and Hebesatz. Note Grundsteuerreform impact.

question_en: What value enhancement potential (upside) exists?
llm_instruction: Assess value enhancement opportunities: re-letting, refurbishment, extension, change of use.

question_de: Wie ist die Liquiditätsreserve der Objektgesellschaft?
question_en: What is the liquidity reserve of the SPV?
llm_instruction: Extract current liquidity position including any maintenance or capex reserves.

question_en: Are there other liabilities of the SPV?
llm_instruction: Identify all liabilities: loans, trade payables, provisions, contingent liabilities.

question_en: How is the purchase price allocated (land/building)?
llm_instruction: Allocate purchase price between land and building for depreciation (AfA) purposes.

question_de: Wann wurde das Gebäude errichtet und wann fanden wesentliche Umbauten statt?
question_en: When was the building constructed and when were major renovations done?
llm_instruction: Extract construction year and all major renovation/modernization dates. Note scope of each renovation.

question_de: Wie groß ist die Brutto- und Netto-Grundfläche (BGF/NGF)?
question_en: What is the gross and net floor area (BGF/NGF)?
llm_instruction: Extract BGF and NGF per DIN 277. Break down by floor and use type.

question_de: In welchem Zustand ist das Tragwerk (Fundament, Stützen, Decken)?
question_en: What is the condition of the structural system?
llm_instruction: Assess structural condition: foundation, load-bearing walls/columns, floor slabs. Flag cracks, settlements, or corrosion.

question_de: In welchem Zustand ist das Dach und wann wurde es zuletzt saniert?
question_en: What is the roof condition and when was it last refurbished?
llm_instruction: Assess roof condition: membrane/covering age and type, insulation, drainage, leak history.

question_de: In welchem Zustand ist die Fassade?
question_en: What is the facade condition?
llm_instruction: Assess facade: type, insulation standard, condition, required repairs.

question_de: In welchem Zustand sind die Fenster und Außentüren?
question_en: What is the condition of windows and external doors?
llm_instruction: Assess windows: type, glazing standard (U-value), age, condition.

question_de: Welche Heizungsanlage ist vorhanden und in welchem Zustand?
question_en: What heating system exists and what is its condition?
llm_instruction: Identify heating system: type, age, capacity, efficiency, maintenance history.

question_de: Welche Lüftungs- und Klimaanlage ist vorhanden?
question_en: What HVAC systems exist?
llm_instruction: Assess HVAC: type, age, capacity, condition, F-gas compliance.

question_de: In welchem Zustand ist die Elektroinstallation?
question_en: What is the condition of the electrical installation?
llm_instruction: Assess electrical installation: age, capacity, compliance with current standards.

question_de: In welchem Zustand sind die Sanitärinstallationen?
question_en: What is the condition of plumbing/sanitary systems?
llm_instruction: Assess plumbing: pipe material, age, condition, Trinkwasserverordnung compliance.

question_de: Wie viele Aufzüge gibt es und in welchem Zustand sind sie?
question_en: How many elevators exist and what is their condition?
llm_instruction: List all elevators: type, capacity, age, last inspection, required upgrades.

question_en: Is a valid energy performance certificate available?
llm_instruction: Verify existence and validity. Extract energy class, Endenergiebedarf, Primärenergiebedarf.

question_de: Liegt ein aktueller Technical Due Diligence Bericht vor?
question_en: Is a current TDD report available?
llm_instruction: Verify availability and currency of TDD. Note major findings and capex estimates.

question_de: Wie hoch ist der geschätzte Instandhaltungsstau (Capex Backlog)?
question_en: What is the estimated maintenance backlog?
llm_instruction: Quantify the maintenance backlog (deferred maintenance) broken down by building component and urgency.

question_de: Bestehen Schadstoffbelastungen im Gebäude (Asbest, KMF, PCB)?
question_en: Are there hazardous materials in the building (asbestos, mineral fibres, PCB)?
llm_instruction: Check for asbestos, KMF, PCB, PAH, formaldehyde. Note locations, quantities, and remediation costs.

question_en: Is the building barrier-free accessible?
llm_instruction: Assess barrier-free accessibility per DIN 18040. Note deficiencies.

question_de: In welchem Zustand sind Keller und Tiefgarage?
question_en: What is the condition of basement and underground parking?
llm_instruction: Assess basement/garage: waterproofing, structural condition, moisture, chloride contamination.

question_en: What building automation (BMS) systems exist?
llm_instruction: Describe BMS: type, coverage, age, integration level.

question_de: In welchem Zustand sind die Außenanlagen?
question_en: What is the condition of external areas?
llm_instruction: Assess external areas: paving, parking, landscaping, fencing, drainage.

question_de: In welchem Zustand sind die Bodenbeläge?
question_en: What is the condition of floor finishes?
llm_instruction: Assess floor finishes: type, condition, replacement needs.

question_de: Welche Brandschutzanlagen (BMA, Sprinkler, RWA) sind vorhanden?
question_en: What fire protection systems (alarm, sprinkler, smoke extraction) exist?
llm_instruction: List all fire protection systems: type, coverage, last inspection, compliance status.

question_en: What security systems exist (access control, intrusion detection)?
llm_instruction: Describe security systems: type, coverage, age.

question_de: Wie ist die IT-Infrastruktur (Glasfaser, Server, Verkabelung)?
question_en: What IT infrastructure exists (fibre, cabling)?
llm_instruction: Assess IT infrastructure: connectivity, fibre availability, structured cabling.

question_de: Welche Nutzlasten/Bodenbelastbarkeit weisen die Geschossdecken auf?
question_en: What floor load capacity do the slabs have?
llm_instruction: Extract floor load capacities per area/floor. Flag inadequacies for intended use.

question_en: What are the clear room heights?
llm_instruction: Measure clear heights per floor and area. Compare with market/use requirements.

question_en: Is emergency power available?
llm_instruction: Identify emergency power: type, capacity, coverage, fuel supply, last test.

question_en: What typical old building defects exist?
llm_instruction: For pre-war buildings: check timber floors, moisture, dry rot, masonry condition.

question_en: Are all utility connections adequately sized?
llm_instruction: Verify adequacy of utility connections for current/intended use.

question_de: Liegen alle erforderlichen technischen Prüfberichte vor?
question_en: Are all required technical inspection reports available?
llm_instruction: List all required periodic inspections: elevators, electrical (DGUV V3), pressure vessels, fire systems. Note status.

question_de: Ist eine Photovoltaikanlage vorhanden oder geplant?
question_en: Is a PV system installed or planned?
llm_instruction: Identify PV systems: capacity, age, feed-in tariff, condition.

question_de: Welche Rückbau- oder Abbruchkosten wären zu erwarten?
question_en: What demolition/dismantling costs would be expected?
llm_instruction: Estimate demolition costs if relevant for redevelopment scenarios.

question_en: What is the floor plan efficiency?
llm_instruction: Calculate ratio of usable area to gross area. Compare with market benchmark.

question_de: Bestehen bekannte Baumängel oder laufende Mängelbeseitigungsverfahren?
question_en: Are there known construction defects or ongoing remediation?
llm_instruction: Identify known construction defects. Check warranty periods and pending remediation.

question_de: Wann stehen wesentliche Erneuerungen der Haustechnik an?
question_en: When are major building services renewals due?
llm_instruction: Assess lifecycle status of all major building services. Estimate replacement timeline and costs.

question_en: Is there building extension potential (addition of floors, annexes)?
llm_instruction: Assess extension potential considering B-Plan constraints, structural capacity, and economic feasibility.

question_en: Is the property listed in the contaminated sites register?
llm_instruction: Check the Altlastenkataster/Verdachtsflächenkataster for listings. Note contamination type and investigation status.

question_en: Is a soil investigation (geotechnical report) available?
llm_instruction: Verify availability. Note soil type, bearing capacity, contamination findings, groundwater level.

question_en: Are soil or groundwater contaminations documented?
llm_instruction: Identify documented contaminations: type, extent, concentration levels, comparison with trigger/action values.

question_en: Are there remediation obligations or orders?
llm_instruction: Check for remediation orders, ongoing monitoring obligations, and estimated remediation costs.

question_de: Wie hoch sind die geschätzten Sanierungskosten?
question_en: What are the estimated remediation costs?
llm_instruction: Quantify estimated remediation costs. Note assumptions and uncertainty range.

question_de: Wurde die historische Nutzung des Grundstücks untersucht (Altlastenrecherche)?
question_en: Has the historical use of the site been investigated?
llm_instruction: Review historical use: former industrial activities, gas stations, dry cleaners, military use.

question_de: Wie hoch ist der Grundwasserstand und bestehen Hochwasserrisiken?
question_en: What is the groundwater level and are there flood risks?
llm_instruction: Extract groundwater level. Check flood risk maps for HQ100/HQ extreme exposure.

question_de: Liegt das Grundstück in einem Überschwemmungsgebiet oder Wasserschutzgebiet?
question_en: Is the property in a flood zone or water protection area?
llm_instruction: Check for official flood zone (Überschwemmungsgebiet) or water protection zone (Wasserschutzgebiet) designations.

question_de: Bestehen Lärm- oder Geruchsbelastungen durch Nachbarnutzungen?
question_en: Are there noise or odour impacts from neighbouring uses?
llm_instruction: Assess environmental impacts on the property from neighbours: noise, odour, vibration.

question_de: Gehen vom Grundstück Emissionen aus, die Nachbarn beeinträchtigen?
question_en: Does the property emit pollutants affecting neighbours?
llm_instruction: Check for emissions from the property affecting neighbours. Verify BImSchG compliance.

question_de: Liegt ein Phase-I oder Phase-II Environmental Site Assessment vor?
question_en: Is a Phase I or Phase II ESA available?
llm_instruction: Verify existence of Phase I/II reports. Summarize findings and recommendations.

question_en: Are there nature protection requirements (Natura 2000, biotope, species)?
llm_instruction: Check for nature protection designations affecting the property or development potential.

question_de: Bestehen Auflagen bezüglich Gefahrstoffen auf dem Gelände?
question_en: Are there obligations regarding hazardous substances on site?
llm_instruction: Identify any hazardous substance storage or handling. Check Störfallverordnung applicability.

question_en: Is an unexploded ordnance (UXO) clearance certificate available?
llm_instruction: Check for UXO clearance certificate. Assess risk based on WWII bombing history of the area.

question_en: How is rainwater disposal managed?
llm_instruction: Describe rainwater management: connection to sewer, on-site infiltration, retention basins.

question_en: Is a noise protection report available?
llm_instruction: Check for noise protection reports. Verify compliance with DIN 4109 and TA Lärm.

question_en: Are there mining or mine subsidence risks?
llm_instruction: Check for historical or active mining beneath the property. Assess subsidence risk.

question_de: Liegt das Grundstück in einem Radon-Vorsorgegebiet?
question_en: Is the property in a radon protection area?
llm_instruction: Check radon exposure. Verify compliance with StrlSchG requirements for buildings.

question_de: Besteht eine Gebäudeversicherung und welche Risiken sind gedeckt?
question_en: Is there building insurance and what risks are covered?
llm_instruction: Extract all covered risks: fire, water damage, storm, natural hazards, glass. Note exclusions.

question_en: Is the building insurance sum adequate (underinsurance)?
llm_instruction: Compare insured value with estimated reinstatement cost. Flag underinsurance risk.

question_en: Is there a property owner liability insurance?
llm_instruction: Verify liability coverage: sum, scope, deductibles.

question_en: Is there rental loss insurance?
llm_instruction: Check for rental loss coverage: duration, amount, waiting period.

question_en: Is natural hazard insurance included?
llm_instruction: Verify natural hazard coverage (Überschwemmung, Erdbeben, Erdrutsch, Schneedruck).

question_de: Wie ist die Schadenhistorie der letzten 5 Jahre?
question_en: What is the claims history for the last 5 years?
llm_instruction: List all insurance claims in the last 5 years: type, amount, settlement status.

question_de: Bestehen Bauleistungs- oder Montageversicherungen für laufende Baumaßnahmen?
question_en: Are there construction insurance policies for ongoing works?
llm_instruction: Check for construction-related insurance if works are ongoing.

question_de: Wie hoch sind die jährlichen Versicherungsprämien?
question_en: What are the annual insurance premiums?
llm_instruction: Summarize annual premiums by policy type. Compare with market benchmarks.

question_de: Welche Versicherungskosten sind auf die Mieter umlagefähig?
question_en: Which insurance costs are recoverable from tenants?
llm_instruction: Identify which insurance costs can be passed to tenants under BetrKV.

question_en: Is there terrorism insurance?
llm_instruction: Check for terrorism coverage, particularly for high-profile assets.

question_en: Are there insurance gaps or expiring policies?
llm_instruction: Identify any gaps in coverage or policies expiring soon after transaction.

question_en: Is there environmental liability insurance?
llm_instruction: Check for environmental liability coverage, especially if contamination risk exists.

question_de: Welcher Grunderwerbsteuersatz gilt im jeweiligen Bundesland?
question_en: What RETT rate applies in the respective federal state?
llm_instruction: Identify the applicable RETT rate (3.5%-6.5% depending on Bundesland).

question_de: Wird die Grunderwerbsteuer durch die Transaktionsstruktur optimiert?
question_en: Is RETT optimized through the transaction structure?
llm_instruction: Analyze whether share deal structure or other mechanisms reduce RETT exposure. Note recent legislative changes.

question_de: Wie ist die umsatzsteuerliche Behandlung der Transaktion?
question_en: What is the VAT treatment of the transaction?
llm_instruction: Determine VAT treatment: exempt (§4 Nr. 9a UStG), optional taxation, or GiG (Geschäftsveräußerung im Ganzen).

question_de: Ist die Umsatzsteueroption (§9 UStG) bei allen Mietverträgen sichergestellt?
question_en: Is the VAT option secured for all leases?
llm_instruction: Verify that the VAT option is properly exercised and maintained. Check risk of Vorsteuerberichtigung (§15a UStG).

question_de: Wie ist die ertragsteuerliche Struktur der Objektgesellschaft?
question_en: What is the income tax structure of the SPV?
llm_instruction: Analyze tax structure: KSt, GewSt, extended reduction (erweiterte Kürzung) eligibility.

question_de: Ist die erweiterte Kürzung (§9 Nr. 1 S. 2 GewStG) anwendbar?
question_en: Is the extended trade tax reduction applicable?
llm_instruction: Verify eligibility for erweiterte Kürzung. Check for harmful activities that could jeopardize it.

question_en: What depreciation rates (AfA) are applied?
llm_instruction: Extract current AfA rates and remaining depreciation volume. Assess impact of acquisition on stepped-up AfA basis.

question_de: Bestehen steuerliche Verlustvorträge in der Objektgesellschaft?
question_en: Are there tax loss carry-forwards in the SPV?
llm_instruction: Identify available loss carry-forwards. Assess §8c/8d KStG risk upon change of shareholders.

question_en: Are tax audits completed or pending?
llm_instruction: Check status of tax audits. Identify years not yet audited and potential exposure.

question_en: Are all relevant tax assessments final?
llm_instruction: Check whether assessments are final or under Vorbehalt der Nachprüfung. Flag years still open.

question_de: Ist die Grundsteuer korrekt festgesetzt (nach Grundsteuerreform)?
question_en: Is the property tax correctly assessed (post-reform)?
llm_instruction: Verify Grundsteuer assessment post-reform. Check for objections or pending reassessments.

question_en: Are there withholding tax obligations for foreign owners?
llm_instruction: Assess withholding tax exposure for non-resident sellers/buyers.

question_de: Bestehen Risiken aus der Spekulationsfrist (§23 EStG)?
question_en: Are there risks from the speculation period?
llm_instruction: Check if the 10-year speculation period applies (private sales). Calculate potential tax exposure.

question_en: Are there tax risks or provisions?
llm_instruction: Identify tax risks: pending disputes, uncertain tax positions, outstanding assessments.

question_en: Are double taxation agreements relevant?
llm_instruction: Assess relevance of DTAs for cross-border ownership structures.

question_en: Are there pending RETT assessments?
llm_instruction: Check for any pending or contested RETT assessments from prior transactions.

question_en: Are there transfer pricing risks for intercompany transactions?
llm_instruction: Assess transfer pricing compliance for intercompany management fees, loans, or other transactions.

question_de: Besteht das Risiko einer Vorsteuerberichtigung (§15a UStG)?
question_en: Is there a risk of input tax correction?
llm_instruction: Calculate potential Vorsteuerberichtigung exposure if VAT-exempt use occurs within the correction period.

question_de: Erfüllt das Gebäude die Anforderungen des Gebäudeenergiegesetzes (GEG)?
question_en: Does the building meet GEG (Building Energy Act) requirements?
llm_instruction: Verify GEG compliance for existing buildings. Flag any upcoming retrofit obligations.

question_en: Is the Workplace Ordinance (ArbStättV) complied with?
llm_instruction: Check compliance with workplace requirements: room size, ventilation, lighting, temperature, sanitary facilities.

question_en: Is the Drinking Water Ordinance complied with (Legionella)?
llm_instruction: Verify Legionella testing compliance per TrinkwV. Note any exceedances and remediation measures.

question_de: Sind alle Aufzüge gemäß BetrSichV geprüft?
question_en: Are all elevators inspected per BetrSichV?
llm_instruction: Verify that all elevators have been inspected by a ZÜS within required intervals.

question_en: Are current electrical inspections (DGUV V3) available?
llm_instruction: Verify DGUV V3 electrical safety inspections are current. Note findings.

question_de: Werden die Betreiberpflichten für technische Anlagen erfüllt?
question_en: Are operator obligations for technical installations fulfilled?
llm_instruction: Review compliance with operator obligations: inspection schedules, maintenance records, documentation.

question_de: Werden Datenschutzanforderungen (DSGVO) in der Gebäudeverwaltung eingehalten?
question_en: Is GDPR complied with in property management?
llm_instruction: Verify GDPR compliance: tenant data handling, CCTV operation, access control data.

question_de: Sind gewerberechtliche Genehmigungen für alle Nutzungen vorhanden?
question_en: Are trade law permits available for all uses?
llm_instruction: Verify trade law permits for all commercial tenants (restaurants, shops, etc.).

question_en: Is the building subject to the Assembly Venues Regulation?
llm_instruction: Check if any spaces qualify as assembly venues (>200 persons). Verify VStättVO compliance.

question_en: Are traffic safety obligations fulfilled?
llm_instruction: Verify compliance with Verkehrssicherungspflichten: winter service, tree inspection, general safety.

question_de: Wurde ein Energieaudit nach EDL-G durchgeführt?
question_en: Has an energy audit per EDL-G been conducted?
llm_instruction: Check if an energy audit per EDL-G has been conducted (mandatory for non-SME companies).

question_en: Are F-Gas Regulation requirements met?
llm_instruction: Verify F-Gas compliance: annual leak checks, refrigerant records, phase-out schedule.

question_en: Are smoke detectors installed per building code?
llm_instruction: Verify smoke detector installation and maintenance per Landesbauordnung requirements.

question_en: Are current accessibility requirements met?
llm_instruction: Assess compliance with current accessibility requirements.

question_en: Are there tree protection ordinances?
llm_instruction: Check for protected trees on site that could restrict development.

question_en: Are there ongoing legal disputes with tenants?
llm_instruction: List all pending tenant disputes: nature, status, claimant, amount in dispute, legal counsel assessment.

question_de: Bestehen Ansprüche aus Baumängeln oder Gewährleistung?
question_en: Are there construction defect or warranty claims?
llm_instruction: Identify construction defect claims, warranty claims, and their status.

question_en: Are there neighbour disputes?
llm_instruction: List neighbour disputes: nature, status, potential impact.

question_en: Are there administrative proceedings or enforcement orders?
llm_instruction: Identify any enforcement orders (Nutzungsuntersagung, Beseitigungsanordnung, Bußgelder).

question_en: Are there disputes with insurers?
llm_instruction: List insurance disputes: nature, amount, status.

question_en: Are there tax appeal proceedings?
llm_instruction: Identify tax disputes: years, amounts, court status.

question_en: Are there environmental law proceedings?
llm_instruction: Identify environmental proceedings: remediation orders, contamination claims.

question_en: Are there employment law proceedings (PM staff)?
llm_instruction: Identify employment disputes, particularly regarding §613a BGB transfer of employees.

question_en: Are there WEG disputes with the owners community?
llm_instruction: Identify WEG disputes: challenged resolutions, cost disputes, maintenance disputes.

question_en: Are there planning law proceedings?
llm_instruction: Identify planning law challenges: B-Plan challenges, neighbour objections to permits.

question_en: Are there claims against the previous seller?
llm_instruction: Identify surviving claims against previous seller under R&W or indemnities.

question_de: Sind drohende Rechtsstreitigkeiten oder Ansprüche bekannt?
question_en: Are there any threatened proceedings or claims?
llm_instruction: Identify any threatened but not yet filed proceedings or claims.

question_en: What energy efficiency class does the building have?
llm_instruction: Extract the energy efficiency class and kWh/sqm values. Assess stranding risk.

question_de: Wie hoch sind die CO2-Emissionen des Gebäudes?
question_en: What are the CO2 emissions of the building?
llm_instruction: Calculate annual CO2 emissions based on energy consumption data. Benchmark against CRREM pathway.

question_de: Ist das Gebäude auf dem CRREM-Dekarbonisierungspfad?
question_en: Is the building on the CRREM decarbonization pathway?
llm_instruction: Assess the building against the CRREM pathway. Identify the stranding year if applicable.

question_de: Liegt eine Nachhaltigkeitszertifizierung vor (DGNB, BREEAM, LEED)?
question_en: Is there a sustainability certification (DGNB, BREEAM, LEED)?
llm_instruction: Identify any green building certifications: type, level, date, scope.

question_en: Is the building EU Taxonomy-compliant?
llm_instruction: Assess EU Taxonomy alignment: substantial contribution to climate change mitigation, DNSH criteria.

question_en: Is an energy renovation roadmap (iSFP) available?
llm_instruction: Check for an individual renovation roadmap (iSFP). Note planned measures and estimated costs.

question_de: Werden erneuerbare Energien genutzt oder sind sie geplant?
question_en: Are renewable energy sources used or planned?
llm_instruction: Identify renewable energy use: PV, solar thermal, heat pumps, green electricity contracts.

question_de: Wie wird die CO2-Kosten-Aufteilung (CO2KostAufG) zwischen Vermieter und Mieter gehandhabt?
question_en: How is the CO2 cost allocation between landlord and tenant managed?
llm_instruction: Determine CO2 cost allocation per CO2KostAufG based on building energy efficiency class.

question_de: Bestehen Green Lease Klauseln in Mietverträgen?
question_en: Are there Green Lease clauses in leases?
llm_instruction: Check leases for sustainability clauses: data sharing, energy targets, green fit-out requirements.

question_de: Welche Maßnahmen zur Wassereffizienz sind umgesetzt?
question_en: What water efficiency measures are implemented?
llm_instruction: Assess water efficiency measures: flow restrictors, rainwater harvesting, greywater systems.

question_de: Werden soziale Nachhaltigkeitsaspekte berücksichtigt (z.B. Barrierefreiheit, Sozialcharta)?
question_en: Are social sustainability aspects considered (accessibility, social charter)?
llm_instruction: Assess social sustainability: accessibility, community impact, tenant well-being initiatives.

question_en: Are there ESG governance policies and reporting?
llm_instruction: Check for ESG governance framework, policies, and reporting obligations.

question_de: Welche physischen Klimarisiken bestehen (Hitze, Starkregen, Sturm)?
question_en: What physical climate risks exist (heat, heavy rain, storm)?
llm_instruction: Assess physical climate risks: heat stress, flooding, storm. Use IPCC scenarios.

question_de: Wie wird das Objekt im Rahmen der SFDR klassifiziert (Art. 6/8/9)?
question_en: How is the property classified under SFDR (Art. 6/8/9)?
llm_instruction: Determine SFDR classification. Assess alignment with Art. 8 or 9 requirements.

question_de: Bestehen Maßnahmen zur Förderung der Biodiversität auf dem Gelände?
question_en: Are there measures to promote biodiversity on site?
llm_instruction: Identify biodiversity measures: green roofs/walls, habitat creation, tree planting.

question_de: Wer ist der aktuelle Property Manager / Hausverwalter?
question_en: Who is the current property manager?
llm_instruction: Identify the current property manager: company, scope, fee structure, contract term.

question_de: Wie lauten die wesentlichen Konditionen des Verwaltervertrags?
question_en: What are the key terms of the management contract?
llm_instruction: Extract management contract terms: scope, fee (% of rent or fixed), term, notice period, KPIs.

question_de: Wie ist das Facility Management organisiert?
question_en: How is facility management organized?
llm_instruction: Describe FM organization: in-house vs. outsourced, scope (technical, infrastructure, commercial).

question_en: What maintenance and service contracts exist?
llm_instruction: List all maintenance/service contracts: scope, contractor, cost, term, termination provisions.

question_en: What key service providers are engaged?
llm_instruction: List all key service providers: scope, cost, contract terms.

question_en: Are there CoC clauses in management contracts?
llm_instruction: Identify CoC clauses in management/FM contracts that could be triggered by the transaction.

question_en: How efficient is the operating cost management?
llm_instruction: Benchmark operating costs per sqm against market comparables. Identify optimization potential.

question_en: How is the WEG (condominium) management organized?
llm_instruction: Describe WEG management: administrator, fee, recent resolutions, Instandhaltungsrücklage status.

question_de: Wie ist die Schlüssel- und Zutrittsverwaltung organisiert?
question_en: How are key and access management organized?
llm_instruction: Describe key management and access control systems.

question_en: How are tenant complaints and requests handled?
llm_instruction: Describe tenant complaint/request handling process and volume.

question_de: Welche Mitarbeiter würden bei Betriebsübergang (§613a BGB) übergehen?
question_en: Which employees would transfer under TUPE (§613a BGB)?
llm_instruction: Identify employees subject to §613a BGB transfer. Note employment terms and costs.

question_de: Wie hoch ist die Instandhaltungsrücklage (bei WEG)?
question_en: What is the maintenance reserve (for WEG)?
llm_instruction: Extract current Instandhaltungsrücklage amount. Assess adequacy against planned works.

question_en: Is a multi-year capex/maintenance plan available?
llm_instruction: Verify existence of a multi-year capex plan. Compare with TDD recommendations.

question_de: Welche kurzfristigen Instandhaltungsmaßnahmen sind erforderlich (0-2 Jahre)?
question_en: What short-term maintenance measures are required (0-2 years)?
llm_instruction: List all measures required within 0-2 years. Quantify costs.

question_de: Welche mittelfristigen Investitionen sind geplant (3-5 Jahre)?
question_en: What medium-term investments are planned (3-5 years)?
llm_instruction: List planned measures for 3-5 year horizon with cost estimates.

question_de: Welche langfristigen Investitionen stehen an (5-10 Jahre)?
question_en: What long-term investments are upcoming (5-10 years)?
llm_instruction: List planned measures for 5-10 year horizon.

question_de: Wie hoch ist das geschätzte Gesamtinvestitionsvolumen über 10 Jahre?
question_en: What is the estimated total investment volume over 10 years?
llm_instruction: Aggregate total capex requirement over 10 years. Break down by category.

question_de: Wann stehen Dach- und Fassadensanierungen an?
question_en: When are roof and facade refurbishments due?
llm_instruction: Estimate timing and cost of roof and facade renewals.

question_de: Wann müssen Heizung, Lüftung und Kälte erneuert werden?
question_en: When must HVAC systems be renewed?
llm_instruction: Estimate HVAC replacement timeline and costs. Consider GEG requirements.

question_en: When are elevator modernizations due?
llm_instruction: Estimate elevator modernization timeline, scope, and cost.

question_de: Welche energetischen Sanierungsmaßnahmen sind erforderlich oder geplant?
question_en: What energy retrofit measures are required or planned?
llm_instruction: List planned energy retrofit measures: scope, cost, energy savings, CO2 reduction, payback period.

question_en: What fire safety upgrades are required?
llm_instruction: List required fire safety upgrades with costs and timelines.

question_de: Welche Mieterausbaukosten fallen bei Neuvermietungen an?
question_en: What tenant fit-out costs arise from re-lettings?
llm_instruction: Estimate typical fit-out costs per sqm for re-lettings. Factor into vacancy cost.

question_de: Sind Fördermittel für Sanierungsmaßnahmen verfügbar (BEG, KfW)?
question_en: Are subsidies available for renovation measures (BEG, KfW)?
llm_instruction: Identify available subsidies for energy retrofits (BEG), fire safety, or accessibility improvements.
